林泽穿越到斩神世界，获得超强学习能力，不管是任何形式的事物只要看一眼就能够学会。
正当他以为自己要靠玩脑子在这个世界生存的时候，林七夜的突然出现改变了这一现状。
当林七夜觉醒神明炽天使米迦勒的时候，林泽觉醒了号称最强神明的戏神。
并且觉醒了禁虚能力【演奏】，林泽可以通过模仿去学习任何禁虚，甚至可以模仿众神，获得众神能力，成为集众神之力的神！
神秘生物？古神教会？西方众神？克鲁苏？
你以为你是谁？不过是我成长路上的养料罢了！
多年后，其余地区神明共同围攻大夏。
林泽一人独守国门，抵御众神的入侵。
海神：“控制海洋的能力比我还强？！这个海神你来当吧！”
宙斯：“我就打了一个小闪电而已，你就拿九天雷劫轰我？过分了啊！”
众神：“你用我们的能力也就算了，怎么还比我们本人用还强啊，没天理啊！！！”
林泽：“我们大夏有一句古话，有朋自远方来，虽远必诛！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/36b9634126cde7772dfa34fd3e148a89","author":"真不是舔狗","author_id":"","book_id":"7420021152141036568","book_name":"斩神：趁七夜青涩，忽悠他当老婆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#80a0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7420021250073821720","read_count":"16057","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1418506"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"452","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,无女主,搞笑轻松,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/02c1a520922f466debc20d59480929bc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443084&x-signature=6cVhWqDaXQaAXG7GzNagoMmrbC0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50125971858","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"211"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174444E4DFDF25EBE8D50B3F0D"}"},"r
